# Copilot/Codex Repository Instructions

## Project context
Global Empires is an asynchronous multiplayer 4X strategy game MVP.

## Always do
- Keep changes MVP-sized.
- Flag oversized requests and split them.
- Preserve deterministic game logic.
- Follow SOLID and separation of concerns.
- Update docs/tests with code changes.

## Response style
- Use bullet lists for plans and tasks.
- Explain tradeoffs and next-step options.
- Keep implementation incremental and reviewable.
